<!-- Metrics over the skin database (De Rigal/Xiao) and the diffuse memory-colour hue
     circle, across tonal placements. Desaturation = 1 - output/input chroma (%). Hue
     drift = |output - input| hue in Kirk Yrg, where chroma survives. ΔE = combined
     chroma+hue move in the chroma-normalized Yrg plane. H-K drift = signed change in
     Nayatani Helmholtz-Kohlrausch apparent-brightness excess, output vs input. -->
